title: thlaspi fendleri var. hesperium
intro: Thlaspi fendleri var. hesperium, also known as Western or Alpine Pennycress, is a subspecies of the Thlaspi fendleri plant, a flowering plant in the mustard family native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Thlaspi fendleri var. hesperium include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil to create teas, tinctures, and salves that can be used to treat a variety of health issues.
